name: Search Filter Bar
description: Search-first public registry filter bar with type tabs, a source filter, sort controls, and result count. Designed for builders browsing Decantr content, not for exposing internal registry-intelligence taxonomy.

standard.description: Full public registry filter bar with search, type tabs, source filter, sort, and result count.

slots.type-row: Scrollable row of type tabs (All, Patterns, Themes, Blueprints, Archetypes, Shells)
slots.meta-row: Result count on the left, source filter and sort on the right
slots.mobile-filters: Collapsible mobile filter surface for source and sort

compact.description: Compact search with inline type and source controls for tighter surfaces.

with-results-count.description: Search bar with result count summary for registry browsing.

slots.results-summary: Result count text and source/sort controls
slots.clear-all: Optional reset action when filters are active

slots.meta-row: Result count, source filter, and sort

visual_brief: Public registry filter bar with one clear purpose: help builders find the right Decantr starting point quickly. Search is the hero. Type tabs are distinct and color-coded. Source filtering is understandable to humans: Official, Community, Organizations. Sort remains available but visually secondary. The bar should feel premium, breathable, and unambiguous, not like an operator console.

responsive.mobile: Search input full-width on its own row. Type tabs become a horizontal scrollable strip. Source and sort move into a collapsible filter surface instead of squeezing the main bar.
responsive.tablet: Search and filters fit comfortably in stacked rows. Type tabs remain visible. Source filter can stay inline if space allows.
responsive.desktop: Search, type tabs, source filter, and sort remain visible without feeling like one dense toolbar. Result count stays readable but subdued.

motion.micro: Tabs, chips, and filter controls may animate lightly on hover and selection, but search remains the dominant visual action.
motion.transitions: Filter-surface expansion, chip removal, and result-state updates should animate over 150-240ms without making the bar feel operator-heavy.

layout_hints.search_input: Full-width search input with magnifying glass icon. Placeholder should explicitly mention Decantr content types and app-starting intent.
layout_hints.filter_tabs: Type tabs should use distinct type-linked treatments so all-type browsing is easy to parse at a glance. The patterns icon should read like a puzzle-piece rather than a generic component glyph.
layout_hints.source_filter: Use human-facing source language: Official, Community, Organizations. Do not expose authored/benchmark/hybrid intelligence taxonomy here.
layout_hints.sort_dropdown: Right-aligned sort with a restrained visual footprint. Keep sort available, but subordinate to search and content-type/source selection.

keyboard: Tab moves from search input to tabs to source and sort controls in logical order.
Arrow keys may move between tab-style filters when implemented as a tab list.
announcements: Active filters, source selection, and sort changes should be announced clearly.
Result count updates should remain available without depending on purely visual placement.
accessibility.focus_management: Opening mobile filter surfaces should move focus into the filter panel and return it to the invoking control on close.

composition.SearchFilterBar: Stack > [SearchRow > SearchInput(d-control, icon: search) + TypeRow > TypeTabs(d-interactive)[] + MetaRow > [ResultCount + SourceFilter + SortSelect(d-control)]]
